name: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
overview: From dangerous explosives and deadly curses that put everyday people at risk, to treasures found in the unlikeliest of ways, each episode digs into the people, the places and historical significance of these discoveries. And sometimes just being in the right place at the right time can make history…because nothing stays hidden forever.

trailers.title: New Series "Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo" | The HISTORY Channel
